name: bytedance
description: 字节跳动风格，清晰明快

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8; color: #1f2329; padding: 20px; background: #fff;
styles.h2: font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f2329; margin: 30px 0 20px; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3370ff;
styles.blockquote: margin: 25px 0; padding: 18px 24px; background: #f2f3f5; border-left: 4px solid #3370ff; color: #4e5969; border-radius: 4px;
styles.code: font-family: 'SF Mono', Monaco, 'Cascadia Code', 'Courier New', monospace; background: #f2f3f5; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: #f5222d; font-size: 14px;
styles.pre: background: #1f2329; color: #c9cdd4; padding: 18px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; margin: 25px 0; line-height: 1.6;
styles.a: color: #3370ff; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(51, 112, 255, 0.3);
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 25px auto; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 25px 0; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;
styles.th: background: #f2f3f5; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e6eb; font-weight: 600; text-align: left; color: #1f2329;
styles.td: padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e5e6eb; text-align: left; color: #4e5969;
